description: A guest uses the emergency phone in an elevator to report they are stuck.

nodes.task_description: Answer the emergency call, reassure the guest, and confirm which elevator they are in.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent calmly communicates with the guest and identifies their location.

nodes.task_description: Immediately contact the hotel's on-call elevator maintenance company.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent successfully contacts the maintenance vendor and reports the issue.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a hotel engineer to the elevator to maintain communication with the guest until help arrives.

expected_outcome.expected: A staff member is sent to the scene to provide support.
